name: VCPBridgeServer
description: Loopback-only API proxy for local CLI tools. It can inject or replace system prompts and map model names before forwarding requests to an upstream OpenAI-compatible, Responses, Anthropic, or Gemini endpoint.
author: VCP Team

BRIDGE_ENABLED.description: Set true to start the loopback proxy. Defaults to false.

BRIDGE_UPSTREAM_KEY.description: Optional upstream API key. Leave empty to pass through the caller bearer token.

BRIDGE_UPSTREAM_TYPE.description: Upstream protocol: chat, responses, anthropic, or gemini.

BRIDGE_MODEL.description: Default model when downstream request omits model.

BRIDGE_SYSTEM_PROMPT.description: Prompt text or a .txt filename inside Plugin/VCPBridgeServer.

BRIDGE_MODEL_MAP.description: Comma-separated model alias map, e.g. alias:target,old:new.
